mapper.insert: INSERT INTO retention_policies (id, scope_type, scope_id, min_days, max_days, max_versions, auto_cleanup, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{minDays}, #{maxDays}, #{maxVersions}, #{autoCleanup}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, scope_type AS scopeType, scope_id AS scopeId, min_days AS minDays, max_days AS maxDays, max_versions AS maxVersions, auto_cleanup AS autoCleanup, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM retention_policies WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, scope_type AS scopeType, scope_id AS scopeId, min_days AS minDays, max_days AS maxDays, max_versions AS maxVersions, auto_cleanup AS autoCleanup, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM retention_policies WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, scope_type AS scopeType, scope_id AS scopeId, min_days AS minDays, max_days AS maxDays, max_versions AS maxVersions FROM retention_policies WHERE is_active = 1 AND auto_cleanup = 1 ORDER BY created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE retention_policies SET min_days = #{minDays}, max_days = #{maxDays}, max_versions = #{maxVersions}, auto_cleanup = #{autoCleanup}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
mapper.select: SELECT file_id FROM documents WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT file_id FROM documents WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT file_id FROM documents WHERE current_path LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT current_version_id FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT version_id AS versionId, revision_no AS revisionNo, `timestamp` AS timestamp, storage_key AS storageKey FROM files_versions WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY `timestamp` DESC, revision_no DESC
